topics.summary: Official campaigning began May 21 for the June 3 local elections and 14 by-elections, with the Seoul mayor race a statistical dead heat (DPK's Jeong Won-o at 43.0% vs PPP's Oh Se-hoon at 42.6%). DPK is running on an 'insurrection accountability and national normalization' frame while PPP counters with 'Lee Jae-myung government oversight' messaging.

evidence_headlines.title: 막 오른 지방선거‥여 "일 잘하는 지방 정부", 야 "정권 독주 견제해야"
남은 열흘에 걸린 여야 대표 운명…선거 결과 따라 권력구도 재편
[6·3 지선] D-10 서울시장 선거…오세훈·정원오, 지지율 '초접전'

topics.summary: The first-instance verdict in former President Yoon Suk-yeol's insurrection trial is scheduled for May 28, just days before the June 3 elections. The PPP has declared it will issue no official response to the verdict, while the special prosecutor has filed additional charges against Yoon.

evidence_headlines.title: 윤석열 내란 재판/전개 — 선고기일 2026년 5월 28일 예고
"내란 심판" "독주 제동"…6·3 공식 선거운동 돌입
윤석열 체포방해 항소심 징역 7년 선고

topics.topic_en: Kim Gun-hee Conviction Appeal and Judge Death
topics.topic_ko: 김건희 항소심 징역 4년 선고 및 담당 판사 사망
topics.summary: Former First Lady Kim Gun-hee was sentenced to four years in prison in her April 28 appeal ruling on stock price manipulation and gift-taking charges; the presiding judge was found dead near the courthouse on May 6. Both the defense and the special prosecutor have since appealed to the Supreme Court.

evidence_headlines.title: 김건희 2심 선고, 징역 4년으로 늘어…도이치 주가조작·통일교 금품수수 유죄
'김건희 유죄' 항소심 판사 숨진 채 발견
김건희-명태균-건진법사 게이트/재판/김건희 — 항소심 전개

topics.topic_ko: 개헌 국민투표 무산 — 국민의힘 표결 보이콧
topics.summary: The PPP boycotted two consecutive National Assembly votes on a constitutional amendment in early May, causing the planned simultaneous constitutional referendum on June 3 to collapse. The amendment would have strengthened parliamentary oversight of martial law and enshrined the May 18 Gwangju uprising in the constitutional preamble; DPK blamed the PPP for election-year obstruction.

evidence_headlines.title: 39년 만의 개헌 무산‥"선거용 반대" vs "상정 자체가 위헌"
국회, 오늘 개헌안 재표결…투표 무산 땐 '6·3 동시투표' 불발
제10차 개헌/제22대 국회 개헌안 — 국민의힘 보이콧 경위

topics.topic_en: Fabricated Prosecution Special Counsel Bill Dispute
topics.summary: The DPK introduced a special counsel bill following its 'fabricated prosecution' parliamentary investigation, controversially including a power to drop charges in ongoing cases. The PPP is attacking the bill as an 'Lee Jae-myung self-pardon scheme,' and dissent has also emerged within the DPK; the ruling party aims to pass it in May.

evidence_headlines.title: 민주당 "조작기소 바로잡을 특검 필요" vs 국민의힘 "셀프 면죄부"
與, '공소취소권 부여' 조작기소 특검법 발의…野 "셀프면죄"(종합)
민주당 내 첫 공개 반대…조작기소 특검법 '공소취소 권한' 논란 확산

topics.topic_en: Trump Tariff Pressure on Korea Trade Deal
topics.topic_ko: 트럼프 한국 관세 25% 재인상 압박 및 대미투자법
topics.summary: Trump threatened to raise tariffs on Korean goods back to 25% from the negotiated 15%, citing the National Assembly's delay in passing a special bill to fund Korea's $350 billion US-investment commitment. The PPP has labeled the situation a 'tariff disaster' and blamed the Lee government for not seeking formal parliamentary ratification of the trade agreement.

evidence_headlines.title: 트럼프, 한국 관세 15%→25% 재인상 선언... 대미투자법 처리 압박
트럼프, 15→25% 날벼락 관세 인상‥대체 왜?
2025년 세계 무역 전쟁/대한민국 — 관세 재인상 압박 경위

topics.topic_en: Lee Jae-myung Approval Rating Hits Record High
topics.topic_ko: 이재명 대통령 국정 지지율 65.5% 최고치 기록
topics.summary: President Lee Jae-myung's job-approval rating reached a post-inauguration high of 65.5% in mid-May polling, with the DPK at 50.5% party support and the PPP at 31.4%. The strong numbers are shaping the DPK's confidence entering the June 3 elections.

evidence_headlines.title: 이 대통령 지지율 65.5% 취임 후 최고‥민주당 50.5%·국힘 31.4%
이재명 대통령 국정수행 지지율 65.5% 기록 — 2026년 5월 23일 주요 뉴스
이재명/지지율 — 5월 NBS 67% 포함 추이

topics.topic_en: Roh Moo-hyun 17th Memorial Shapes Election Mood
topics.topic_ko: 노무현 전 대통령 서거 17주기 추도식 — 이재명 대통령 참석
topics.summary: President Lee Jae-myung attended the 17th memorial ceremony for former President Roh Moo-hyun at Bongha Village on May 23, the first sitting presidential attendance in nine years. The event drew leading DPK figures and was folded into the party's election-week narrative around democratic values and political continuity.

evidence_headlines.title: 오늘 노무현 전 대통령 17주기…與, 선거전 잠시 멈추고 '추모'
노무현 전 대통령 17주기 추도식 봉하마을서 엄수
[D-BIZ 정치 리포트] 노무현 전 대통령 서거 17주기 추도식 봉하마을 개최

method_notes: Captured via Anthropic API (Sonnet 4.6) with web_search for live Korean political coverage. Topic labels (topic_en) are stable handles for cross-snapshot rank comparison.
